optionA.text: Body delgado, branquias primeros presentes from setiger 18, o later, as grueso filaments arranged con máximo dos o tres in tuft

optionB.text: Body grueso, branquias primeros presentes from more anterior setiger as grueso tufts of very fine filaments

optionA.text: Neuropodia of branquial segmento approach midventrally; único par of oesophageal sacs presentes

optionB.text: Neuropodia of branquial segmentos well separado; más de uno pair of oesophageal sacs presentes
